comment.text: DynamoCheckpoint is the Schema for the dynamocheckpoints API It represents a
container checkpoint that can be used to restore pods to a warm state
Name must be unique within a namespace.
Namespace defines the space within which each name must be unique.
Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource.
CreationTimestamp is set by the server when a resource is created.
Number of seconds allowed for graceful deletion.
DeletionTimestamp is set by the server when graceful deletion is requested.
Finalizers must be empty before the object is deleted from the registry.
- "<string>"
GenerateName is an optional prefix used by the server to generate a unique
name.
Generation is a sequence number representing a specific desired state.
Labels are key value pairs used to organize and select objects.
ManagedFields records which actor manages which fields.
APIVersion defines the version of this field set.
FieldsType is the discriminator for the fields format.
FieldsV1 stores a versioned field set.
Manager identifies the workflow managing these fields.
Operation is the type of operation that produced this managedFields
entry.
Subresource is the name of the subresource used to update the object.
Time is when this managedFields entry was added.
OwnerReferences lists objects depended on by this object.
API version of the referent.
Kind of the referent.
Name of the referent.
UID of the referent.
BlockOwnerDeletion controls foreground deletion behavior.
Controller marks the managing controller owner reference.
ResourceVersion is an opaque internal version value.
SelfLink is a deprecated read-only field.
UID is the unique in time and space value for this object.
DynamoCheckpointSpec defines the desired state of DynamoCheckpoint
Identity is legacy compatibility metadata. DGD-managed automatic checkpoints
use an operator-owned checkpoint ID instead.
BackendFramework is the runtime framework (vllm, sglang, trtllm)
Model is the model identifier (e.g., "meta-llama/Llama-3-70B")
Dtype is the data type (fp16, bf16, fp8, etc.). Deprecated for DGD-managed
automatic checkpoints; it only participates in the legacy identity hash
fallback for standalone objects.
DynamoVersion is the Dynamo platform version (optional). Deprecated for
DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in the legacy
identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
ExtraParameters are additional parameters that affect the checkpoint hash.
Use for any framework-specific or custom parameters not covered above.
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
MaxModelLen is the maximum sequence length. Deprecated for DGD-managed
automatic checkpoints; it only participates in the legacy identity hash
fallback for standalone objects.
PipelineParallelSize is the pipeline parallel configuration. Deprecated
for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in the legacy
identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
TensorParallelSize is the tensor parallel configuration. Deprecated for
DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in the legacy
identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
Job defines the configuration for the checkpoint creation Job
PodTemplateSpec allows customizing the checkpoint Job pod This should
include the container that runs the workload to be checkpointed and any
workload/runtime env, service account, GMS, or DRA wiring needed by that
container. Auto-created checkpoints from DynamoGraphDeployment render
Dynamo defaults before creating the DynamoCheckpoint.
Standard object's metadata. More info:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata
Specification of the desired behavior of the pod. More info:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#spec-and-status
ActiveDeadlineSeconds specifies the maximum time the Job can run
Deprecated: BackoffLimit is ignored. Checkpoint Jobs never retry.
SharedMemory controls the tmpfs mounted at /dev/shm for the checkpoint Job
pod. When omitted, checkpoint Jobs use the same default 8Gi tmpfs as
Dynamo components.
Disabled, when true, opts out of mounting a shared-memory medium for the
component. When false (or unset), shared memory is enabled and Size is
required (enforced by the validating webhook). Size is ignored when
Disabled is true.
TargetContainerName is the container in PodTemplateSpec to snapshot.
Deprecated: TTLSecondsAfterFinished is ignored. Checkpoint Jobs use a
fixed 300 second TTL.
GPUMemoryService records checkpoint-time GPU Memory Service metadata for a
prepared checkpoint Job pod. The DynamoCheckpoint controller does not inject
GMS/DRA resources; auto-created checkpoints from DynamoGraphDeployment
prepare the pod template before creating this object. Manual GMS-enabled
checkpoints must provide the prepared pod template; the controller fails the
checkpoint if the required GMS/DRA wiring is missing. This field is
intentionally outside spec.identity, so it does not affect the checkpoint
identity hash or deduplication.
Enabled activates GMS wiring. GPU resources on client containers are
replaced with a DRA ResourceClaim for shared GPU access.
DeviceClassName is the DRA DeviceClass to request GPUs from.
ExtraClientContainers lists additional user-declared containers that
should be wired as GMS clients in pods rendered from the enclosing spec.
DGD/DCD services apply this to service pods. Auto-created checkpoints
apply checkpoint job clients before creating the DynamoCheckpoint; manual
DynamoCheckpoint users must provide an already-prepared pod template. In
each rendered pod, only matching container names are wired; absent names
are ignored.
- "<string>"
ExtraClientPods declares additional GMS client pods for inter-pod GMS.
This field is reserved for future use and is rejected until inter-pod
client orchestration is wired.
Name identifies this client pod.
PodTemplate configures the pod to run as a GMS client.
Mode selects the GMS deployment topology.
DynamoCheckpointStatus defines the observed state of DynamoCheckpoint

fields.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds
Standard Kubernetes object metadata.
Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource.
CreationTimestamp is set by the server when a resource is created.
Number of seconds allowed for graceful deletion.
DeletionTimestamp is set by the server when graceful deletion is requested.
Finalizers must be empty before the object is deleted from the registry.
GenerateName is an optional prefix used by the server to generate a unique name.
Generation is a sequence number representing a specific desired state.
Labels are key value pairs used to organize and select objects.
ManagedFields records which actor manages which fields.
APIVersion defines the version of this field set.
FieldsType is the discriminator for the fields format.
FieldsV1 stores a versioned field set.
Manager identifies the workflow managing these fields.
Operation is the type of operation that produced this managedFields entry.
Subresource is the name of the subresource used to update the object.
Time is when this managedFields entry was added.
Name must be unique within a namespace.
Namespace defines the space within which each name must be unique.
OwnerReferences lists objects depended on by this object.
API version of the referent.
BlockOwnerDeletion controls foreground deletion behavior.
Controller marks the managing controller owner reference.
Kind of the referent.
Name of the referent.
UID of the referent.
ResourceVersion is an opaque internal version value.
SelfLink is a deprecated read-only field.
UID is the unique in time and space value for this object.
DynamoCheckpointSpec defines the desired state of DynamoCheckpoint

GPUMemoryService records checkpoint-time GPU Memory Service metadata for
a prepared checkpoint Job pod. The DynamoCheckpoint controller does not
inject GMS/DRA resources; auto-created checkpoints from
DynamoGraphDeployment prepare the pod template before creating this object.
Manual GMS-enabled checkpoints must provide the prepared pod template; the
controller fails the checkpoint if the required GMS/DRA wiring is missing.
This field is intentionally outside spec.identity, so it does not affect
the checkpoint identity hash or deduplication.
metadata: x-kubernetes-validations[0].message: extraClientContainers is only supported with mode=intraPod
x-kubernetes-validations[1].message: extraClientPods is only supported with mode=interPod
x-kubernetes-validations[2].message: extraClientPods is reserved for inter-pod GMS and is not implemented yet

fields.description: DeviceClassName is the DRA DeviceClass to request GPUs from.

Enabled activates GMS wiring. GPU resources on client containers are
replaced with a DRA ResourceClaim for shared GPU access.

ExtraClientContainers lists additional user-declared containers that should
be wired as GMS clients in pods rendered from the enclosing spec.
DGD/DCD services apply this to service pods. Auto-created checkpoints
apply checkpoint job clients before creating the DynamoCheckpoint; manual
DynamoCheckpoint users must provide an already-prepared pod template.
In each rendered pod, only matching container names are wired; absent
names are ignored.

ExtraClientPods declares additional GMS client pods for inter-pod GMS. This field is
reserved for future use and is rejected until inter-pod client orchestration is wired.
Name identifies this client pod.
PodTemplate configures the pod to run as a GMS client.
Mode selects the GMS deployment topology.

Identity is legacy compatibility metadata. DGD-managed automatic
checkpoints use an operator-owned checkpoint ID instead.
BackendFramework is the runtime framework (vllm, sglang, trtllm)

Dtype is the data type (fp16, bf16, fp8, etc.).
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.

DynamoVersion is the Dynamo platform version (optional).
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.

ExtraParameters are additional parameters that affect the checkpoint hash.
Use for any framework-specific or custom parameters not covered above.
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.

MaxModelLen is the maximum sequence length.
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
Model is the model identifier (e.g., "meta-llama/Llama-3-70B")

PipelineParallelSize is the pipeline parallel configuration.
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.

TensorParallelSize is the tensor parallel configuration.
Deprecated for DGD-managed automatic checkpoints; it only participates in
the legacy identity hash fallback for standalone objects.
Job defines the configuration for the checkpoint creation Job
ActiveDeadlineSeconds specifies the maximum time the Job can run
Deprecated: BackoffLimit is ignored. Checkpoint Jobs never retry.

PodTemplateSpec allows customizing the checkpoint Job pod
This should include the container that runs the workload to be checkpointed
and any workload/runtime env, service account, GMS, or DRA wiring needed
by that container. Auto-created checkpoints from DynamoGraphDeployment
render Dynamo defaults before creating the DynamoCheckpoint.

Standard object's metadata.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata

Specification of the desired behavior of the pod.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#spec-and-status

SharedMemory controls the tmpfs mounted at /dev/shm for the checkpoint Job pod.
When omitted, checkpoint Jobs use the same default 8Gi tmpfs as Dynamo components.
metadata: x-kubernetes-validations[0].message: size is required when disabled is false

fields.description:
Disabled, when true, opts out of mounting a shared-memory medium for the
component. When false (or unset), shared memory is enabled and Size is
required (enforced by the validating webhook). Size is ignored when
Disabled is true.
TargetContainerName is the container in PodTemplateSpec to snapshot.

Deprecated: TTLSecondsAfterFinished is ignored. Checkpoint Jobs use a fixed
300 second TTL.
DynamoCheckpointStatus defines the observed state of DynamoCheckpoint
